::: {.callout-tip}
## Commit your changes
Remember to save your progress regularly by committing your changes with Git.

1. Save your changes to the files above in RStudio with the `Save` button.
2. Render any Quarto documents with the `Render` button.
3. Open the `Git` tab in RStudio.
4. Tick the files listed above, don't worry about any others.
5. Click `Commit` and write a short message in the `Commit message` describing your changes, something like e.g. "Practical 1 part 1" is sufficient, then click `Commit`. Close the `Commit` popup.

:::
